headline: Toll Brothers, NVR, and PulteGroup Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the renewed Middle East tensions pushed Treasury yields back toward nine-month highs, threatening to drive 30-year mortgage rates higher and further damage already-fragile buyer demand.

raw.headline: Toll Brothers, NVR, and PulteGroup Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know

headline: Nvidia and PulteGroup are helping this startup put mini data centers on homes
summary: A network of Span nodes, communicating with each other across the country, is the equivalent of a small to mid-sized traditional data center.

raw.headline: Nvidia and PulteGroup are helping this startup put mini data centers on homes
raw.summary: A network of Span nodes, communicating with each other across the country, is the equivalent of a small to mid-sized traditional data center.

headline: Homes could become mini data centers to power AI growth
summary: CNBC’s Diana Olick reports Span, Nvidia and PulteGroup are testing home based data center nodes, using unused grid capacity to cut costs, ease community pushback and support growing AI demand.

raw.headline: Homes could become mini data centers to power AI growth
